title: expand_vars Cow::Borrowed fast path is correct
description: WHY THIS IS CORRECT AND SHOULD BE DEFENDED: expand_vars returns Cow::Borrowed(s) when variables_enabled is false or the string contains no dollar or backslash. The modified flag is only set when a substitution or escape actually changes the string content. If the only dollar-sequence is an unclosed brace, modified stays false and Cow::Borrowed is returned — which is the original string, identical to what the out buffer would contain. The logic is correct: no spurious allocations and no loss of content.
